1.content:
You had stayed up late in bed on your phone, scrolling through social media. Eventually, extremely late at night, you turned your phone off and finally fell asleep. You slept peacefully until..

"WAKE UP BUG!"

You jumped awake, staring up at the giant figure. You were absolutely shocked by who's giant face consumed your vision. You sat in a cold, metal cage held in the massive hands of the koopa. You were two, maybe three inches tall. You pinched yourself, then slapped yourself, then pinched yourself awake.

"Nonononononono wake up, wake up!" You said as you tried to wake yourself up.

"Haha! This ain't no dream bud, this is the real deal!" Bowser laughed, shaking the cage and you. "You belong to me now, I brought you here to be my toy!"

"W-What are you gonna do to me?" You asked nervously, getting straight to the point.

"Well, bug, the first thing you're gonna do is..."
1.title: In the Beginning

choices: Make your way through unharmed (scat warning)
Live the rest of your life in bowser's stomach
11.content:
You were shocked to your core as Bowser said those words. Surely he didn't actually mean to eat you?

"Bwahaha, you're only a small snack, but lucky for you I just ate so you'll have plenty of time until you turn into my awesome body. Think of it this way, not everyone get to have the honor and privilege of being part of something as awesome as I am!" He laughed before opening the cage, tilting the door towards his mouth.

You slid down the slick, metal floor and into the large mouth. Bowser didn't swallow immediately, instead keeping you in his warm, damp mouth. It smelt like smoke and meat, that latter smell must've been his lunch. Soon the tounge, which at your size was a few feet long, started to move to you around. Moving you around his sharp teeth, careful not to hurt you too much, and getting plaque and other teeth gunk stuck onto you. It reeked.

Finally Bowser got tired of you and brought you to the back of his throat, sending you down the tight tube into the massive room that was his stomach. It was the size of a small city to you, filled to the brim with food. The food was different kinds of meat and breads, chewed to a fine paste which you sank in if you moved too much. "Bwahaha, you tasted so good I almost wish I didn't swallow!" He laughed, shaking your prison. It was so disgusting in here, a humiliating fate.

Do you digest, or somehow escape? Or maybe neither
11.title: "Make you my snack!"

13.content:
Your face paled as the king said those fateful words. Being a seat cushion to anyone would be terrible, but there was few worse people in the Mario series to be under the ass of than King Bowser. The lizard set the cage on his thigh before opening it up and grabbing you with his cold, clammy hand. He tossed the cage to the side before hovering slightly above his chair. You looked at it, it looked about how you would expect. A well worn red cushion, damp with sweat and a skid mark through the center.

Bowser tossed you onto the center and, as anyone would do, you started to run. Where do you end up?
13.title: "Make you my seat cushion!"

choices: Make him hard, so you can attempt an escape
Sit tight until he releases you
132.content:
You ran for your life and made it pretty far but unfortunately you didn't make it far enough. You yelped as two musky, sweaty orbs crushed you from above. The leathery sack surrounded and suffocated you as you tried to escape, only causing Bowser pleasure. "Bwahaha, you feel pretty good under there bug. Can't handle the power of my royal balls?" He mocked as he reached down and grabbed his cock, lifting it and dropping them a few times just to torture you.

The smell of raw manly musky filled your nose as the sack crushed you over and over. Sweat got into your mouth a few times before Bowser finally stopped. You were thankful for that, but escape was still far from possible. Each ball was twice your size and weighed as much as you did, not to mention the cock sitting on top of them.

What's your game plan?
132.title: Beneath his royal balls

14.content:
Surely Bowser didn't have that bad of armpits. He was a lizard, not exactly a creature known for getting sweaty. Bowser opened the cage and pulled you out before smirking. "Good luck bug." He said before lifting his arm.

The smell was horrific.

Surprisingly, Bowser had tufts of red hair in his armpits and they were damp with sweat. They smelt like rotten onions left in a hot high school locker room. You screamed as bowser brought you fast to his pit, sticking you face first into it. You almost vomited as you got some sweat in your mouth.

"Lick 'em clean! If I lift my arm again I'll make you regret it!" He threatened before closing his arm. His firm biceps closing around you tightly, squeezing the life out of you as you sat in the disgusting chamber. With no tools given to clean, you knew he meant for you to lick his armpits clean. Do you sink yourself to that level or risk whatever King Bowser might try to do to you?
14.title: "Clean my pits!"

15.content: You sat in fear, anticipating what Bowser was gonna do.
15.title: Other

152.content: You were surprised, who could Bowser possibly think of giving you to?
152.title: "Give you to someone else!"

1523.content: Who else could there be?
1523.title: Other

info.brief_description: What happens when you're shrunk with King Koopa?
info.description:
You go to bed one night but when you wake up you're in the hands of King Bowser. What's a guy to do?

General rules. Be literate, try not to end it, etc. Same rules as most interactives. I'm super into creative ideas too, so go wild with the interactive. Whatever creative ideas you have feel free to use them. I'm open for other characters besides Bowser to appear like Junior, the Koopalings, other bosses (such as Midbus or Petey Piranha), etc.
